<!--
Template created by KittyTeggie under the Creative Commons Zero v1.0 (public domain) license.
https://github.com/kittyteggie/mediawiki-templates

THIS TEMPLATE DEPENDS OF THE 'MessageBox' TEMPLATE THAT IS AVAIDABLE IN THE 'MessageBox.wiki' FILE
-->
{{MessageBox
|text = '''This article is a candidate for deletion.'''<br>
This page has been marked as a candidate for deletion by a member of 
the community. {{#if: {{{1|}}}|&nbsp;for the following reason(s):'''{{{1}}}.|'''}}
If you want to discuss the potential deletion of this page (whether it be to contest
the deletion or give extra reasoning not covered by the reasons given above), please 
visit the pages talk page or improve the page and remove the
'''<code><nowiki>{{delete}}</nowiki></code>''' tag.<br><br>
<small>(''Remember to check [[Special:Whatlinkshere/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|what links here]]
and  [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=history}} the page history] before 
deleting.'')</small>
|image = Nuvola apps important.png <!-- THIS IS AN EXAMPLE FILE, CHANGE IT WITH WHATEVER ICON YOU'LL USE -->
|imagelink = Category:Candidates for deletion
|imagewidth = 45px
|border-color = 10px solid red}}
<includeonly>[[Category:Candidates for deletion]]</includeonly>
